title: fix: normalize backslashes in rootDir setting for Windows
description: The normalizePath and isWithinRootDir functions in src/utils/publisherHelpers.ts only handle forward slashes. On Windows, users may type their rootDir setting with backslashes (e.g. Notes\subfolder). The startsWith comparison then silently fails, treating all files as outside the root dir — nothing gets published. Fix: convert backslashes to forward slashes at the start of both functions.

title: chore: guard addStatusBarItem with Platform.isDesktop
description: main.ts calls addStatusBarItem() unconditionally on load. The status bar is a desktop-only UI element in Obsidian. While the API likely does not throw on mobile, the status bar and its click handler are dead code on mobile. Wrap the statusBarItem setup in a Platform.isDesktop check.

title: fix: replace fetch with requestUrl for mobile compatibility
description: The plugin uses native fetch() in FlowershowClient.ts for all HTTP requests (lines 100 and 219). On Obsidian mobile (iOS/Android, Capacitor WebView), fetch() to cross-origin URLs fails due to platform security restrictions. Replace both fetch() calls with requestUrl() from the obsidian package, which routes requests through the native app layer and is the recommended approach for cross-platform plugins.
